subcodes.first_line: The missive of that faithful friend hath been received, and inasmuch as it testified to thy health and well-being, great joy was attained thereby [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: نامه آن دوست باوفا رسید چون مشعر بر صحت و سلامتی آنجناب بود مسرت حاصل گشت از
subcodes.subjects: @justice and mercy, @light and darkness, @Zoroastrianism; Mahabad and Zoroaster, @destruction of books, @review of publications
